visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Close-up shot of several pink plush 'Care Bears' with rainbow bellies stacked on a warehouse shelf. The Costco logo and text about weekly specials are overlaid in the center. (2) A rapid series of shots showcasing various consumer goods in a warehouse setting. Each shot features a different product: packs of toilet paper, Ferrero Rocher boxes, Lotte Custard Cakes, Pocky snacks, Haribo gummy bears, and Orion turtle chips. Large yellow text overlays detail the original price, the discount amount, and the final sale price for each item. (3) The sequence continues through dozens of other items including wine bottles, cases of beer, sparkling water, trays of grapes, boxes of eggs, and various packaged meats and fish in refrigerated sections. The camera pans or moves slightly in each short clip, maintaining a high-energy pace focused on the products and their price tags. (4) The final segment features frozen foods like tempura shrimp, instant noodle bowls, Starbuck coffee beans, and soup mixes. Each item is clearly labeled with the same bold price breakdown until the video concludes.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: No real people are visible in the video; only products and text.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Industrial warehouse aisles filled with bulk goods stacked on steel shelving. Different sections include dry goods, snacks, produce, beverages, and refrigerated/frozen aisles.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy male voice-over speaking in Mandarin, set against an upbeat pop-style background track with a strong, synthesized beat. The narrator's tone is enthusiastic and professional, characteristic of a promotional advertisement. (2) Every visual transition is accompanied by a subtle 'whoosh' or 'pop' sound effect, marking the rapid cut to a new product. The narrator continues to speak at a very fast rate, rhythmically listing the names and sale prices of the items shown on screen without pauses. (3) The background music maintains a constant tempo and volume throughout the entire duration, providing a consistent energetic bed for the narration. No significant ambient noise or incidental sounds are audible, indicating a clean, post-produced audio track. (4) The narration remains continuous and dense, with high pitch variability and arousal, aiming to maintain viewer attention through the long list of products until the final second of the video.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To quickly inform viewers of weekly discounts and promotional items at Costco, encouraging them to visit the store during the specified dates.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Directly listing products with sales prices and mentioning the brand Costco

high_inference.freeDescribe: A fast-paced, information-dense shopping guide video optimized for social media engagement.
